name: Alper
intro: I build software end-to-end. I'm 18 and based in Türkiye. Most of what I make starts as something I personally wanted to exist.
now: Learning Linux-based systems. Nothing shipped yet, heads down, building.
about: I write across the stack: backend services, web interfaces, the small scripts in between. I've been building things with code since 2020. I care about software that feels considered: fast, quiet, and finished.
Outside of code: I go to the gym, read world classics, and I study.
